articles.description: MOTD pundit Danny Murphy explains why, as well as Arsenal's superior quality in Sunday's north London derby, they exploited Tottenham's tactical weakness too.
articles.title: Danny Murphy column: 'They were attacking from every angle in the end' - why Spurs couldn't keep Arsenal out

articles.description: United States win the men's Olympic ice hockey gold medal for the first time in 46 years by beating neighbours Canada in overtime.
articles.title: 2026 Winter Olympics: USA win men's ice hockey gold for first time in 46 years

articles.description: Wolves striker Tolu Arokodare and Sunderland winger Romaine Mundle have become the latest Premier League players to be sent racist abuse on social media this weekend.
articles.title: Racism in football: Tolu Arokodare and Romaine Mundle receive abuse on social media

articles.description: Liverpool's late 1-0 win at Nottingham Forest puts the Reds firmly in the Champions League hunt after a "robbery" of a victory at the City Ground.
articles.title: Liverpool's Champions League hopes boosted by 'heist' at Nottingham Forest

articles.description: France record a bonus-point win against a spirited Italy in Lille to maintain their bid for a Six Nations Grand Slam and back-to-back titles.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: France 33-8 Italy - hosts maintain Grand Slam bid

articles.description: IOC president Kirsty Coventry says the athletes "showed us that the Olympic Games are a place for everyone" as she closes this year's Winter Games.
articles.title: 2026 Winter Olympics Closing Ceremony: Milan-Cortina concludes in Verona

articles.description: Rory McIlroy shoots a four-under-par 67 but it is not enough to overhaul winner Jacob Bridgeman, who wins by one shot at the Genesis Invitational in Los Angeles.
articles.title: Genesis Invitational: Rory McIlroy finishes one shot behind Genesis winner Jacob Bridgeman

articles.description: Arsenal passed the north London derby test with flying colours as Premier League title race looks likely to go to the wire, says chief football writer Phil McNulty
articles.title: Tottenham 1-4 Arsenal: Gunners pass derby test of nerve as title race hots up

articles.description: Will Jacks, labeled England's 'Jack of all trades' by Harry Brook, delivers again at the T20 World Cup to keep the winter of a lifetime rolling on.
articles.title: T20 World Cup: Will Jacks delivers for Harry Brook and England again

articles.description: After a defeat for Celtic and surprise draw for Rangers, where does the latest weekend of drama leave the Scottish Premiership title race?
articles.title: Old Firm 'buckle under pressure' as incredible title race twists again
